text:
<s>[INST] Draft a follow-up email for this COLD travel lead.
Name         : Preethi Rao
Interested in: Japan
Budget       : Not specified INR
Category     : COLD
Tone         : Friendly, professional, not pushy. Max 120 words. [/INST] {
  "subject": "Your Japan holiday \u2014 personalised offer inside",
  "email_body": "Hi Preethi Rao,\n\nThank you for your interest in travelling to Japan! We have curated some exclusive packages that perfectly match your preferences and budget.\n\nWhenever you are ready to explore, we are here to help.\n\nWarm regards,\nTravel CRM Team"
} </s>

<s>[INST] Create a confirmed booking with the following details:
Customer name  : Neha Joshi
Email          : neha@email.com
Destination    : Switzerland
Package        : Swiss Alps 6N/7D
Adults         : 2
Children       : 2
Travel dates   : 2026-04-10 to 2026-04-16
Budget (INR)   : 400000
Special requests: Snow activities, family rooms [/INST] {
  "status": "confirmed",
  "customer_name": "Neha Joshi",
  "destination": "Switzerland",
  "package": "Swiss Alps 6N/7D",
  "travel_dates": {
    "start": "2026-04-10",
    "end": "2026-04-16"
  },
  "guests": {
    "adults": 2,
    "children": 2
  },
  "total_cost": 400000,
  "special_requests": "Snow activities, family rooms",
  "next_step": "Send confirmation email with payment link"
} </s>

<s>[INST] Draft a follow-up email for this HOT travel lead.
Name         : Pooja Iyer
Interested in: Maldives
Budget       : 250000 INR
Category     : HOT
Tone         : Friendly, professional, not pushy. Max 120 words. [/INST] {
  "subject": "Your Maldives holiday \u2014 personalised offer inside",
  "email_body": "Hi Pooja Iyer,\n\nThank you for your interest in travelling to Maldives! We have curated some exclusive packages that perfectly match your preferences and budget.\n\nWe would love to connect \u2014 are you free for a quick call this week?\n\nWarm regards,\nTravel CRM Team"
} </s>

<s>[INST] Generate a 4-day travel itinerary for:

Guests      : 2 adults, 0 children
Special     : Desert safari, burj khalifa visit [/INST] {
  "destination": "Dubai, UAE",
  "total_days": 4,
  "itinerary": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Day 1 activity",
      "activities": [

        "Afternoon leisure",
        "Evening cultural experience"
      ],
